hint: the body controller REJECTED the goal (the arm did not move). This height (0.558 m) is almost certainly OUTSIDE the reachable range: the commanded z maps to a leg-pitch joint past its limit (error 600101 '指令超上限位' = command over the UPPER joint limit -> the waist is being asked to go LOWER than it mechanically can). Try a height closer to the ~0.68 m nominal (e.g. raise it in 1-2 cm steps to find the floor).
